title: Sphaerostephanos porphyricola
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos porphyricola is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Sphaerostephanos, which is a group of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The family Dryopteridaceae is a large and diverse group of ferns that also includes the genera Dryopteris and Polystichum.
